discussion_comments.comment_body: Replace it with the generic RAGFlowFormItem component.
It is recommended to use SimilaritySliderFormField directly.
It is recommended to use shadcn's Table component to maintain consistency in styling and behavior.
It is recommended to use SearchInput.
It is recommended to place the Dialog in a separate file as a standalone component.
It is recommended to use the global color variables defined in the `tailwind.css` file.
